problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
mechanism: Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration
hypothesis: If Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration is applied to rapidly, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
